Services

One practice, whatever the hour of the problem.

Toothache rarely waits for office hours. Since April 2026 the practice has run around the clock, so the same trusted team is on hand whether it's a Tuesday morning cleaning or a Saturday-night emergency.

01

24-hour emergencies

Sudden pain, breaks, or swelling. Call or WhatsApp any time and the practice will see you.

02

Check-ups & cleaning

Routine exams, scale and polish, and straightforward advice on keeping your smile healthy.

03

Fillings & extractions

Cavities treated early, and careful extractions when a tooth can't be saved.

04

Children's dentistry

Gentle, patient care for younger patients, welcomed from age 3 and up.

05

Dentures & restorations

Full and partial dentures fitted and adjusted for comfortable, natural-feeling wear.

06

Oral health promotion

Guidance and education on prevention, so fewer visits are urgent ones.

Pricing

Clear prices, no surprises.

From a quick consultation to a full smile makeover — here's what to budget for. All prices are in South African Rand.

ORTHODONTICS · SAME-DAY SERVICE

Fashion Braces

ZAR 2,000 ZAR 2,500
COSMETIC

Teeth Whitening

ZAR 3,700
Consultations

Online Consultation

Phone or video consultation — advice, referrals, or a treatment plan without an in-chair visit.

ZAR 500

Basic Consultation

In-chair exam and diagnosis, with X-rays taken where needed.

ZAR 830

Braces Consultation

Orthodontic assessment and treatment plan ahead of fitting braces.

ZAR 2,000
General & Restorative

Teeth Cleaning Special

Full scale and polish to clear plaque and tartar build-up.

ZAR 1,100

Tooth Restoration / Filling

Composite filling per tooth — decay removed and restored in the same visit.

ZAR 1,100

Two Gold or Silver Crowns

Two-crown special, gold or silver — your choice between the two.

ZAR 1,350 ZAR 1,800
Cosmetic

Teeth Whitening

In-chair whitening treatment for a visibly brighter smile.

ZAR 3,700
Orthodontics

Fashion Braces

Braces with a choice of coloured bands — fitted the same day.

ZAR 2,000 ZAR 2,500

Slimming Wire

Archwire change for patients already in braces, to keep tooth movement on track.

ZAR 1,800

About the practice

Led by Dr Innocentia Mashego

BDS (Medunsa) · Dental Practitioner · PR No. 0684104
BDS — Medunsa PR 0684104 Polokwane, Limpopo

Dr Mashego trained at Medunsa and has built the practice on Market Street into a dependable home for dental care in Polokwane — known locally as the place people go for a "ngaka ya meno," a doctor of teeth, at any hour.

The practice keeps things simple: real appointments, straight answers, and a team that's genuinely glad to see you, whether you're three years old or seventy-three.

The team

The people behind the chair.

A small, steady team — front desk, dental assistants, and Dr Mashego — working together every shift, day and night.

OUR TEAM

The Dr Innocentia Mashego practice team
